# bottomImageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display at the bottom of the gauge.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var bottomImageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This image provider produces a full-color image, masked to a circle.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **centerTextProvider**: The text to display in the center of the gauge.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
